Legend for Boxxle-style numeric maps
------------------------------------
Each level starts with two numbers, an implied wall surrounding the inner body.
  [width]
  [height]

Then follow [height] lines of [width] digits each.
Each digit represents a cell type:

1 = Floor (empty space)
2 = Goal (target spot)
3 = Box on goal
4 = Player on floor
5 = Wall
6 = Player on goal
0 = Box on floor

Credit: https://bardmask.itch.io/boxxle-remake

=== LEVEL: 1-01.txt ===
9
9
111115555
140015555
102215111
102015131
111011131
511000031
510001001
510001111
511111555
